mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, region, name, sort_no, status FROM category WHERE region = #{region} ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, parent_id, region, name, sort_no, status FROM category WHERE region = #{region} AND id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM category WHERE region = #{region} AND parent_id = #{parentId} AND LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name}) AND (#{excludeId} IS NULL OR id != #{excludeId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category(parent_id, region, name, sort_no, status) VALUES(#{parentId}, #{region}, #{name}, #{sortNo}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE category SET status = #{status} WHERE region = #{region} AND id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM category WHERE region = #{region} AND id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM category WHERE region = #{region} AND parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM category WHERE region = #{region} AND parent_id = #{parentId}

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM shop WHERE region = #{region} AND category_id = #{categoryId}) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM merchant_shop_change WHERE region = #{region} AND category_id = #{categoryId}) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM rank_config WHERE region = #{region} AND category_id = #{categoryId}) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `rank` WHERE region = #{region} AND category_id = #{categoryId})
SELECT id, code, region, name, sort_no, status FROM city WHERE region = #{region} ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, code, region, name, sort_no, status FROM city WHERE region = #{region} AND id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM city WHERE region = #{region} AND LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name}) AND (#{excludeId} IS NULL OR id != #{excludeId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO city(code, region, name, sort_no, status) VALUES(#{code}, #{region}, #{name}, #{sortNo}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE city SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, sort_no = #{sortNo} WHERE region = #{region} AND id = #{id}
UPDATE city SET status = #{status} WHERE region = #{region} AND id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM city WHERE region = #{region} AND id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM area WHERE region = #{region} AND city_id = #{cityId}

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM shop WHERE region = #{region} AND city_id = #{cityId}) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM merchant_shop_change WHERE region = #{region} AND city_id = #{cityId}) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM home_banner WHERE region = #{region} AND city_id = #{cityId}) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM home_feed WHERE region = #{region} AND city_id = #{cityId}) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM rank_config WHERE region = #{region} AND city_id = #{cityId}) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `rank` WHERE region = #{region} AND city_id = #{cityId})
SELECT id, city_id, region, name, sort_no, status FROM area WHERE region = #{region} AND id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM area WHERE region = #{region} AND city_id = #{cityId} AND LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name}) AND (#{excludeId} IS NULL OR id != #{excludeId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO area(city_id, region, name, sort_no, status) VALUES(#{cityId}, #{region}, #{name}, #{sortNo}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE area SET city_id = #{cityId}, name = #{name}, sort_no = #{sortNo} WHERE region = #{region} AND id = #{id}
UPDATE area SET status = #{status} WHERE region = #{region} AND id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM area WHERE region = #{region} AND id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM shop WHERE region = #{region} AND area_id = #{areaId}) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM merchant_shop_change WHERE region = #{region} AND area_id = #{areaId})
SELECT id FROM shop WHERE region = #{region} AND area_id = #{areaId} ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT id FROM merchant_shop_change WHERE region = #{region} AND area_id = #{areaId} ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
